final:
module top_module(
  input in,
  input enable_l,
  input clock,
  input hold_reset,
  output reg out
);always @(posedge clock or negedge hold_reset) begin
  if (!hold_reset) begin
    out <= 1'b0;
  end else if (!enable_l) begin
    out <= out;
  end else begin
    out <= in;
  end
end

endmodule
